blocking_risks.title: Sample blocking risk for regression harness

consensus.rationale: Synthetic consensus block — exercises regression schema checks without requiring a real pipeline run.

_fixture_note: This is a deterministic synthetic run shipped with the repo so the regression test suite always has SOMETHING to validate. Do not edit by hand; if the schema changes, regenerate via tests/regression/regenerate_fixture.py (if added) or rewrite this file to match the new schema.
